name: ace-tool
description: Windows ACE plugin for codebase search and prompt enhancement through Codex skills and scripts.

interface.shortDescription: Search codebases and enhance prompts with ACE workflows.
interface.longDescription: ACE Tool packages Windows-first codebase retrieval and prompt enhancement as Codex skills backed by local scripts and the ace-tool-win executable, without requiring MCP server registration.
defaultPrompt: Search this codebase with ACE Tool.
Enhance this request with ACE Tool.
Find relevant project context before editing.
